github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Follow the Conventional Commits specification. The commit message must start with one of the types defined in .github/conventional-commit-types.json, optionally followed by a scope in parentheses. Append ! before the colon to denote a breaking change. Format: <type>(<optional scope>)[optional !]: <short description>. Use the imperative mood, lowercase, no trailing period.

github.copilot.chat.pullRequestDescripti.text: The PR title must follow the Conventional Commits specification using one of the types defined in .github/conventional-commit-types.json, optionally followed by a scope in parentheses. Append ! before the colon to denote a breaking change. Format: <type>(<optional scope>)[optional !]: <short description>. Use the imperative mood, lowercase, no trailing period. The title must pass the regex enforced by the CI workflow (see .github/workflows/pr-title-check.yml for the exact pattern). Conceptually, it matches ^(<type>)(\(.+\))?!?: .+ where <type> is one of the allowed types.
